title: Iran vows revenge for security chief Larijani’s killing
summary_full: Larijani is the most senior Iranian official killed since US-Israeli strikes on 28 February that killed Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
summary_public: Larijani is the most senior Iranian official killed since US-Israeli strikes on 28 February that killed Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei

IR.label: negative
